steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
# Calculations for fundamental indicators for Light S.A. as of 2024-12-31 (prices in BRL)
price = 4.67
shares_out = 372_555_324
Revenue = 22_559_220_000
Gross = 2_327_529_000
EBIT = 1_177_061_000  # EBIT (12m) de acordo com dados
DeprecAmort = 893_938_000
EBITDA = EBIT + DeprecAmort
NetIncome = 1_643_779_000
TotalAssets = 23_716_936_000
Caixa = 185_797_000
Fornecedores = 2_252_917_000
PatrimLiquido = 5_218_457_000
# Debt (bruta): circulante + não circulante (empenhos e financiamentos)
Debt_bruta = 7_039_930_000 + 8_801_850_000
# Disponibilidades and others
# Working capital
AtivoCirculante = 7_158_984_000
PassivoCirculante = 5_034_239_000
WC = AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirculante
NetCurrentAssets = AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirculante
# Debt/Equity metrics
MarketCap = price * shares_out
NetDebt = Debt_bruta - Caixa
EV = MarketCap + NetDebt
VPA = PatrLiquido / shares_out if False else None
# Simple re-calc: compute per share metrics
LPA = NetIncome / shares_out
EPS = LPA
VPA = PatrLiquido / shares_out
P_L = price / EPS
P_VP = price / VPA
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT / shares_out)
P_EBITDA = price / (EBITDA / shares_out)
PSR = price / (Revenue / shares_out)
P_Ativos = price / (TotalAssets / shares_out)
P_CapGiro = price / (WC / shares_out)
P_AtivCircLiq = price / (NetCurrentAssets / shares_out)
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT
LiqCorr = NetCurrentAssets / PassivoCirculante
MargBruta = Gross / Revenue
MargEBIT = EBIT / Revenue
MargLiquida = NetIncome / Revenue
EBIT_Av = EBIT / TotalAssets
Giro = Revenue / TotalAssets
ROE = NetIncome / PatrLiquido if PatrLiquido!=0 else None
ROIC = EBIT / (TotalAssets - Fornecedores - Caixa)
DividendaPatr = Debt_bruta / PatrLiquido
GiroAtivos = Giro
# Print with two decimals for ratios and two decimals for ROEs
print("LPA: %.4f" % LPA)
print("EPS: %.4f" % EPS)
print("P/L: %.2f" % P_L)
print("P/VP: %.2f" % P_VP)
print("P/EBIT: %.2f" % P_EBIT)
print("P/EBITDA: %.2f" % P_EBITDA)
print("PSR: %.4f" % PSR)
print("P/Ativos: %.4f" % P_Ativos)
print("P/Cap.Giro: %.4f" % P_CapGiro)
print("P/Ativ Circ Liq: %.4f" % P_AtivCircLiq)
print("EV/EBITDA: %.2f" % EV_EBITDA)
print("EV/EBIT: %.2f" % EV_EBIT)
print("Marg Bruta: %.2f%%" % (MargBruta*100))
print("Marg EBIT: %.2f%%" % (MargEBIT*100))
print("Marg Liquida: %.2f%%" % (MargLiquida*100))
print("EBIT / Ativo: %.2f%%" % (EBIT_Av*100))
print("ROIC: %.2f%%" % (ROIC*100))
print("ROE: %.2f%%" % (ROE*100))
print("Liquidez Corr: %.2f" % LiqCorr)
print("Div Br/ Patr: %.2f" % DividendaPatr)
print("Giro Ativos: %.2f" % GiroAtivos)
print("EV: %.2f" % EV)
print("MarketCap: %.2f" % MarketCap)
print("NetDebt: %.2f" % NetDebt)
print("EBITDA: %.2f" % EBITDA)
print("EPS per share: %.4f" % EPS)
print("LPA: %.4f" % LPA)
print("VPA: %.2f" % VPA)
"} }

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
# Corrected calculations for fundamental indicators for Light S.A. as of 2024-12-31 (BRL)
price = 4.67
shares_out = 372_555_324
Revenue = 22_559_220_000
Gross = 2_327_529_000
EBIT = 1_177_061_000  # EBIT (12m)
DeprecAmort = 893_938_000
EBITDA = EBIT + DeprecAmort
NetIncome = 1_643_779_000
TotalAssets = 23_716_936_000
Caixa = 185_797_000
Fornecedores = 2_252_917_000
PatrimLiquido = 5_218_457_000
# Debt (bruta): circulante + não circulante (empréstimos e financiamentos)
Debt_bruta = 7_039_930_000 + 8_801_850_000
# Current section for working capital
AtivoCirculante = 7_158_984_000
PassivoCirculante = 5_034_239_000
WC = AtivoCirculante - PassivoCirculante  # Working capital
NetCurrentAssets = WC
# Market metrics
MarketCap = price * shares_out
NetDebt = Debt_bruta - Caixa
EV = MarketCap + NetDebt
# Per share metrics
LPA = NetIncome / shares_out
EPS = LPA
VPA = PatrLiquido / shares_out
P_L = price / EPS
P_VP = price / VPA
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT / shares_out)
P_EBITDA = price / (EBITDA / shares_out)
PSR = price / (Revenue / shares_out)
P_Ativos = price / (TotalAssets / shares_out)
P_CapGiro = price / (WC / shares_out)
P_AtivCircLiq = price / (NetCurrentAssets / shares_out)
# Margins and returns
GrossMargin = Gross / Revenue
EBITMargin = EBIT / Revenue
NetMargin = NetIncome / Revenue
EBITOverAssets = EBIT / TotalAssets
GiroAtivos = Revenue / TotalAssets
# ROEs and ROIC
ROE = NetIncome / PatrLiquido
ROIC = EBIT / (TotalAssets - Fornecedores - Caixa)
# Cash liquidity and debt ratios
LiqCorr = NetCurrentAssets / PassivoCirculante
DivBrPatr = Debt_bruta / PatrLiquido
# EV/EBITDA and EV/EBIT
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT
GiroAtivos2 = GiroAtivos
# Output
print("LPA: {0:.4f}".format(LPA))
print("EPS: {0:.4f}".format(EPS))
print("P/L: {0:.2f}".format(P_L))
print("P/VP: {0:.2f}".format(P_VP))
print("P/EBIT: {0:.2f}".format(P_EBIT))
print("P/EBITDA: {0:.2f}".format(P_EBITDA))
print("PSR: {0:.6f}".format(PSR))
print("P/Ativos: {0:.6f}".format(P_Ativos))
print("P/Cap.Giro: {0:.6f}".format(P_CapGiro))
print("P/Ativ Circ Liq: {0:.6f}".format(P_AtivCircLiq))
print("EV/EBITDA: {0:.2f}".format(EV_EBITDA))
print("EV/EBIT: {0:.2f}".format(EV_EBIT))
print(" Margens: Bruta {0:.4f}, EBIT {1:.4f}, Liquida {2:.4f}".format(GrossMargin, EBITMargin, NetMargin))
print("EBIT/Ativo: {0:.4f}".format(EBITOverAssets))
print("ROIC: {0:.2f}%".format(ROIC*100))
print("ROE: {0:.2f}%".format(ROE*100))
print("Liquidez Corr: {0:.2f}".format(LiqCorr))
print("Div Br/ Patr: {0:.2f}".format(DivBrPatr))
print("Giro Ativos: {0:.4f}".format(GiroAtivos))
print("Giro Ativos (alternativo): {0:.4f}".format(GiroAtivos2))
print("EV: {0:.2f}".format(EV))
print("MarketCap: {0:.2f}".format(MarketCap))
print("NetDebt: {0:.2f}".format(NetDebt))
print("EBITDA: {0:.2f}".format(EBITDA))
print("EPS (LPA per share): {0:.4f}".format(EPS))
print("VPA: {0:.2f}".format(VPA))
"} }
